mechanism: Tech equity inflows of $40-60B/month disproportionately benefit Tier 0 tech-proxy currencies (TWD, KRW) while starving traditional EM of capital, reinforcing the need for multi-tier segmentation. Carry-to-vol compression below 0.5 particularly affects traditional EM.
regime_dependence: Holds during AI/tech investment boom; would reverse if tech equity flows decline or EM growth differential widens sufficiently
